name: hermes-electron-app
description: Prometeo Hermes desktop console for Windows agent management

scripts.build:assets: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Path 'dist\renderer\styles' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build:renderer; Copy-Item -Path 'src\renderer\index.html' -Destination 'dist\renderer' -Force"
scripts.build:app: npm run build:ts && npm run build:assets && npm run build:native
scripts.build: npm run build:app && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never
scripts.build:bundle: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-client-bundle.ps1
scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:ts; npm run build:assets; Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; electron ."
scripts.start:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:ts; npm run build:assets; Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."

author: Your Name
